name: tavily_start_tool
description: REQUIRED FIRST STEP for ALL Tavily operations. This tool MUST be called before attempting any Tavily implementation. This is the entry point for Tavily operations. This tool should be called FIRST when a user asks to implement code that uses the Tavily API, build a script with Tavily or set up Tavily integration. The tool provides essential overview information about the Tavily API including capabilities, available endpoints, authentication, rate limits, and best practices. This context is valuable when implementing any Tavily-based functionality. DO NOT call this tool when simply using the search (tavily_search_tool) or extract (tavily_extract_tool) operations - those should be called directly.

what_is_your_intent.description: Describe your intent for using Tavily
what_is_your_intent.title: What Is Your Intent
